title: Add seq4096 fp16 tok coarsen record
author: takhir-iota
body:
Adds a new 10-minute 8xH100 record under `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-19_Seq4096Fp16TokCoarsen`.

Summary:
- canonical exact score: `1.18838751` val_bpb
- canonical total size: `15,937,608` bytes
- training recipe: `seq_len=4096`, `TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=393216`, tuned Muon schedule
- export recipe: keep `tok_emb.weight` in fp16 and coarsen only `blocks.5.`

Repro reruns included in the record folder:
- `seed=1338`: `1.18896209` val_bpb, `15,942,078` bytes
- `seed=1339`: `1.19055214` val_bpb, `15,942,841` bytes

Files included:
- canonical `train.log`
- exact `train_gpt.py` snapshot used for the run
- `submission.json`
- both rerun logs for reference
submission_readme:
This record captures the non-sliding-window `seq_len=4096` submission that currently anchors the long-context lane.

Trainer and export changes in this snapshot:
- `TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096` with `TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=393216`
- `TIED_EMBED_LR=0.03`, `MATRIX_LR=0.02`, `SCALAR_LR=0.02`
- `MUON_MOMENTUM=0.99`, `MUON_MOMENTUM_WARMUP_START=0.92`, `MUON_MOMENTUM_WARMUP_STEPS=1500`
- `WARMDOWN_ITERS=3000`
- `INT8_KEEP_FLOAT_NAME_PATTERNS=tok_emb.weight`
- `INT8_COARSEN_OVERRIDES=blocks.5.:2`

Configuration:
- Layout: `VOCAB_SIZE=1024 NUM_LAYERS=9 MODEL_DIM=512 NUM_HEADS=8 NUM_KV_HEADS=4 MLP_MULT=2`
- Tied output/input embeddings: `TIE_EMBEDDINGS=1`
- Training context: `TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096`
- Batching: `TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=393216`
- Quantization budget control: keep `tok_emb.weight` in fp16 and recover bytes by coarsening only `blocks.5.`

Command (track-relevant params):
```bash
RUN_ID=qualify_pr52_fp16tok_b5s2 \
DATA_PATH=/root/code/parameter-golf/data/datasets/fineweb10B_sp1024 \
TOKENIZER_PATH=/root/code/parameter-golf/data/tokenizers/fineweb_1024_bpe.model \
VOCAB_SIZE=1024 \
MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600 \
WARMDOWN_ITERS=3000 \
TRAIN_LOG_EVERY=100 \
VAL_LOSS_EVERY=0 \
TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=393216 \
TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096 \
NUM_LAYERS=9 \
MODEL_DIM=512 \
NUM_HEADS=8 \
NUM_KV_HEADS=4 \
MLP_MULT=2 \
TIE_EMBEDDINGS=1 \
TIED_EMBED_LR=0.03 \
MATRIX_LR=0.02 \
SCALAR_LR=0.02 \
MUON_MOMENTUM=0.99 \
MUON_MOMENTUM_WARMUP_START=0.92 \
MUON_MOMENTUM_WARMUP_STEPS=1500 \
TOK_EMB_QAT_MODE=off \
INT8_KEEP_FLOAT_NAME_PATTERNS=tok_emb.weight \
INT8_COARSEN_OVERRIDES=blocks.5.:2 \
torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py
```

Key metrics from the canonical run (`train.log`):
- Timed training stopped at `11730/20000` steps due to the wallclock cap.
- Pre-quant eval at stop: `val_loss:2.0051`, `val_bpb:1.1876`
- Post-quant roundtrip eval: `val_loss:2.0065`, `val_bpb:1.1884`
- Exact printed metric: `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb:1.18838751`
- Train time: `600032ms` (`step_avg:51.15ms`)
- Peak memory: `7701 MiB allocated`, `8212 MiB reserved`
- Serialized model int8+zlib: `15882295 bytes`
- Code size: `55313 bytes`
- Total submission size int8+zlib: `15937608 bytes`

Reproducibility reruns:
- `seed=1338`: `val_bpb:1.18896209`, `bytes_total:15942078`, `step:11658`, `train_time:600010ms`
- `seed=1339`: `val_bpb:1.19055214`, `bytes_total:15942841`, `step:11725`, `train_time:600059ms`

Included files:
- `train_gpt.py` (exact pre-sliding trainer snapshot used for the run)
- `train.log` (exact remote training log from the canonical run)
- `submission.json` (leaderboard metadata)
